eras.name: Primeval History
eras.blurb: Creation, the Fall, the Flood, and the Tower of Babel

eras.name: The Patriarchs
eras.blurb: Abraham, Isaac, Jacob, Joseph — and Job

eras.name: The Exodus & Wilderness
eras.blurb: Out of Egypt, the Law, and forty years of wandering

eras.name: The Conquest
eras.blurb: Joshua and the taking of the promised land

eras.name: The Judges
eras.blurb: The cycle of judges, and the story of Ruth

eras.name: The United Kingdom
eras.blurb: Samuel, Saul, and the reign of David

eras.name: The Reign of Solomon
eras.blurb: The temple and the wisdom books

eras.name: The Divided Kingdom
eras.blurb: Israel and Judah split, and the early prophets

eras.name: Judah's Fall & the Exile
eras.blurb: The last kings, Jerusalem falls, and Babylon

eras.name: The Return
eras.blurb: Home from exile — temple, walls, and the last prophets

eras.name: The Gospels
eras.blurb: The life, death, and resurrection of Jesus

eras.name: Revelation
eras.blurb: John's vision and the close of the age
